'''âp-zh-b''' ('''kapazhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadratize|quadratize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadratize|quadratize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-zh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kapazhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazhab|thipazhab]] || [[word:jipazhab|jipazhab]] || [[word:shipazhab|shipazhab]] || [[word:kipazhab|kipazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazhab|thuthupazhab]] || [[word:jujupazhab|jujupazhab]] || [[word:shushupazhab|shushupazhab]] || [[word:kukupazhab|kukupazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazhab|thupazhab]] || [[word:jupazhab|jupazhab]] || [[word:shupazhab|shupazhab]] || [[word:kupazhab|kupazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazhab|thupazhab]] || [[word:jupazhab|jupazhab]] || [[word:shupazhab|shupazhab]] || [[word:kupazhab|kupazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazhab|thepazhab]] || [[word:jepazhab|jepazhab]] || [[word:shepazhab|shepazhab]] || [[word:kepazhab|kepazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazhab|thothopazhab]] || [[word:jojopazhab|jojopazhab]] || [[word:shoshopazhab|shoshopazhab]] || [[word:kokopazhab|kokopazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazhab|thopazhab]] || [[word:jopazhab|jopazhab]] || [[word:shopazhab|shopazhab]] || [[word:kopazhab|kopazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazhab|thopazhab]] || [[word:jopazhab|jopazhab]] || [[word:shopazhab|shopazhab]] || [[word:kopazhab|kopazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazhab|thĂŠpazhab]] || [[word:jĂŠpazhab|jĂŠpazhab]] || [[word:shĂŠpazhab|shĂŠpazhab]] || [[word:kĂŠpazhab|kĂŠpazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazhab|thathapazhab]] || [[word:jajapazhab|jajapazhab]] || [[word:shashapazhab|shashapazhab]] || [[word:kakapazhab|kakapazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazhab|thapazhab]] || [[word:japazhab|japazhab]] || [[word:shapazhab|shapazhab]] || [[word:kapazhab|kapazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazhab|thapazhab]] || [[word:japazhab|japazhab]] || [[word:shapazhab|shapazhab]] || [[word:kapazhab|kapazhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapazhab|shapazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapazhab|goshapazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapazhab|gokishapazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapazhabnĂŒ|shapazhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapazhabnknĂŒ|goshapazhabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazhabnĂŒ|gokishapazhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapazhabshĂ«|shapazhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkshĂ«|goshapazhabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapazhabshĂ«|gokishapazhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazhabro|shapazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkro|goshapazhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazhabro|gokishapazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazhabmu|shapazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkmu|goshapazhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazhabmu|gokishapazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapazhabsher|shapazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapazhabnksher|goshapazhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapazhabsher|gokishapazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapazhabng|shapazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkng|goshapazhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapazhabng|gokishapazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapazhabya|shapazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkya|goshapazhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapazhabya|gokishapazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapazhabyam|shapazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkyam|goshapazhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapazhabyam|gokishapazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazhabnĂŒshĂ«|shapazhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazhabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapazhabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazhabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapazhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazhabnĂŒro|shapazhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazhabnknĂŒro|goshapazhabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazhabnĂŒro|gokishapazhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazhabnĂŒmu|shapazhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazhabnknĂŒmu|goshapazhabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazhabnĂŒmu|gokishapazhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazhabshĂ«nĂŒ|shapazhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapazhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazhabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapazhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazhabshĂ«ro|shapazhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkshĂ«ro|goshapazhabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazhabshĂ«ro|gokishapazhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazhabshĂ«mu|shapazhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkshĂ«mu|goshapazhabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazhabshĂ«mu|gokishapazhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazhabronĂŒ|shapazhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkronĂŒ|goshapazhabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazhabronĂŒ|gokishapazhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazhabroshĂ«|shapazhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkroshĂ«|goshapazhabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazhabroshĂ«|gokishapazhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazhabromu|shapazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkromu|goshapazhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazhabromu|gokishapazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazhabmunĂŒ|shapazhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkmunĂŒ|goshapazhabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazhabmunĂŒ|gokishapazhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazhabmushĂ«|shapazhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkmushĂ«|goshapazhabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazhabmushĂ«|gokishapazhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazhabmuro|shapazhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazhabnkmuro|goshapazhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazhabmuro|gokishapazhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
